title: bauhinia miriamae
intro: Bauhinia miriamae, also known as the 'Mountain Bauhinia', is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Maori medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Bauhinia miriamae include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Bauhinia miriamae can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
